description: Planted-defect ground truth for the mini_repo analysis fixture (see its README). Used by `hw4 evaluate` to score detector predictions as a confusion matrix (L07 §13.2). Each candidate is a (node, detector-kind) pair with the verdict a correct detector must reach: `defect` = must be flagged, `clean` = must NOT be flagged (false-positive guard).

candidates.label: defect
candidates.rationale: app/engine.py imports and drives every other app module, mixing loading, math, and formatting concerns.

candidates.label: clean
candidates.rationale: Healthy hub: high fan-in but a single concern. The god-node detector's healthy-hub counter-check must NOT flag it.

candidates.label: clean
candidates.rationale: Shared helper, but no mandatory-path bottleneck. Guards against over-flagging common utilities as single points of failure.

candidates.label: defect
candidates.rationale: orphan/legacy.py has no inbound or outbound imports to the main component.

candidates.label: clean
candidates.rationale: Test scaffolding, genuinely disconnected. A correct topological observation but not a code defect; surfaced for human triage, so it costs precision rather than masking a real bug.

candidates.label: defect
candidates.rationale: The README documents app.plugins, which exists nowhere in the tree — a documented-but-absent claim.
